zh.Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾帕文哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Spencer Esq.於1514年5月20日出生在英國貝德福爾帕文哈姆時，他的父親Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight36歲，母親Christine Etheldreia Baker38歲。他於1540年與Anne Buckeley結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年12月3日在英國貝德福爾可普爾享年33歲。

zh-hans.Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England: 英国貝德福爾帕文哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Spencer Esq.于1514年5月20日出生在英国貝德福爾帕文哈姆时，他的父亲Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight36岁，母亲Christine Etheldreia Baker38岁。他于1540年与Anne Buckeley结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1547年12月3日在英国貝德福爾可普爾享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Spencer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name for someone who dispensed provisions or money, from Middle English spenser(e), spencer(e) ‘household steward, butler, almoner’ (Anglo-Norman French espenser, Old French despensier). Compare Spence and Spender . There is some dispute about the origins of the Spencer family, whose most famous member in recent times was the late Princess of Wales, born Lady Diana Spencer (1961–97). Some sources say that they are descended from William the Conqueror's steward, Robert Despencer. What is clear is that by the 15th century they had become prosperous from sheep farming in Northamptonshire. Robert Spencer (died 1627) was said to be the wealthiest man in England. Their titles have included Earls of Sunderland and Earls Spencer; and through the female line the 5th Earl of Sunderland also became Duke of Marlborough in 1733. This connection was the result of the marriage, in 1700, of the 3rd Duke of Sunderland to the daughter of John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough. The youngest son of this union, John Spencer (1708–46), was the father of the 1st Earl Spencer (1734–83).

variants.name: Spence
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a servant employed in the pantry of a great house or monastery, from Middle English spense, spence ‘pantry, larder, storeroom’ (Old French despense, from a Late Latin derivative of dispendere, past participle dispensus ‘to weigh out or dispense’). Compare Spencer .

variants.name: Spender
meanings: occupational name or status name from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘steward, treasurer’, a shortened form of Middle English, Old French despendour, denoting someone who managed money or supplies. Compare Spencer .
alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘spender (of money), spendthrift’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Spencer Esq. was born on 20 May 1514, in Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight, was 36 and his mother, Christine Etheldreia Baker, was 38. He married Anne Buckeley in 1540. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 3 December 1547, in Cople, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Spencer Esq. est né le 20 mai 1514, à Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Christine Etheldreia Baker, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Anne Buckeley en 1540. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1547, à Cople, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Spencer Esq. am 20. Mai 1514 in Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight 36 und seine Mutter Christine Etheldreia Baker 38. Er hat 1540 Anne Buckeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1547 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Cople, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Spencer Esq. è nato il il 20 maggio 1514 nel Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Christine Etheldreia Baker, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Anne Buckeley nel 1540. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 3 dicembre 1547, nel Cople, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 33 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Spencer Esq.(이)가 1514년 5월 20일 영국 베드퍼드실르 파븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Christine Etheldreia Baker(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1540년 Anne Buckeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 12월 3일 영국 베드퍼드실르 코플에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Spencer Esq. nasceu em 20 de maio de 1514, em Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Christine Etheldreia Baker, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Buckeley em 1540. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1547, em Cople, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Spencer Esq. родился 20 мая 1514 г. в местности павенам, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Spencer van Mylles, Knight было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Christine Etheldreia Baker, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Buckeley в 1540 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 3 декабря 1547 г. в местности копл, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.
